beats.text: Have you ever... really thought about the fact that we might be the least interesting thing in the universe?
Like statistically... the odds that we are the only intelligent life in an infinite universe... are so astronomically small that it's almost offensive to even consider it.
And then you do DMT. And then you realize... oh. Oh. Something has been here this whole time. You just didn't have the right door.
The entities you meet on DMT are not random. They're consistent. People all over the world, different cultures, no contact with each other — they describe the same beings. That's not nothing, man.

And TOOL figured this out. Maynard James Keenan figured this out. That album Lateralus — the Fibonacci sequence in the lyrics, the time signatures — that's a man who went somewhere... and came back with a message.
